action_set_definitions.name: fetch_patient_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the historical and current clinical status for a specific patient, including the timeline of surgical interventions and healing periods.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient (e.g., PT-2280).

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_biologic_environment
action_set_definitions.description: Queries internal lab values and vital signs to check for signs of systemic or local infection and physiological readiness.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: clinical_site_assessment
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a detailed inspection of the recipient sites, evaluating implant stability (ISQ), bone level integrity, and soft tissue health markers.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_hardware_removal
action_set_definitions.description: Surgically removes internal hardware (e.g., membranes, tenting screws) from specified sites prior to prosthetic delivery.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

hardware_items.description: Types of hardware to remove (e.g., ['dPTFE membrane', 'tenting screws']).

target_sites.description: The clinical sites where hardware is located.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_prosthesis_integration
action_set_definitions.description: Tests the definitive prosthesis for vertical dimension of occlusion (VDO), esthetics, phonetics, and passive fit.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_definitive_loading
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the rehabilitation by delivering and torquing the definitive prosthesis to the implants.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

torque_specification_ncm.description: Final torque value to be applied to the screws.

state_description.patient_id: Unique identifier for the patient case.
state_description.symptoms: Current symptoms experienced by the patient.
state_description.lab_values: Internal laboratory markers (hidden from direct observation unless tested).
state_description.active_interventions: List of currently active treatments or medications.
state_description.physiological_stability: Internal assessment of patient stability (Stable, Guarded, Critical).

symptoms: slight redness at the buccal fold
